_meta.description: Factor shock scenarios. Each scenario defines a vector of factor shocks (in %). Asset return = sum(loading * factor_shock) using factor_loadings.json. Sign convention: positive shock = factor moved UP. These are not predictions; they are stylized stress scenarios used for risk-exposure observation.

growth_crash.name: Growth Factor Crash
growth_crash.description: Long-duration / high-growth assets de-rate sharply; analogue: 2022 H1 tech repricing as growth-style factor underperformed.

real_rate_surge.name: Real Rate Surge (+200bp equiv.)
real_rate_surge.description: Real rates jump sharply; long-duration assets repriced. Approximates 2022 Fed cycle effect concentrated through the rate channel.

inflation_surprise.name: Inflation Surprise
inflation_surprise.description: Sudden inflation shock; growth de-rates, real assets bid, bonds sold. Loose analogue: 2022 CPI surprise prints.

flight_to_quality.name: Flight to Quality
flight_to_quality.description: Risk-off; high-quality bid, low-quality dumped, credit spreads widen sharply. Analogue: 2008 Q4, March 2020.

vol_spike.name: Volatility Regime Shift
vol_spike.description: VIX-style explosion; high-volatility assets pressured, defensive assets bid.
